name: NeonCRM Nonprofit CRM API
what_it_does: NeonCRM REST API for nonprofit donor management, fundraising, and membership management. Enables AI agents to manage donor and constituent record management for nonprofit CRM operations, handle donation processing and fundraising campaign workflow for nonprofit revenue management, access membership management and renewal automation for association and membership organizations, retrieve event registration and management data for nonprofit event operations, manage grant tracking and reporting for foundation and grant-funded organizations, handle email marketing and constituent communication workflow, access volunteer management and coordination data for nonprofit operations, retrieve payment processing and recurring gift management for donor stewardship, manage tribute and memorial gift tracking for donor recognition, and integrate NeonCRM data with QuickBooks, email marketing, and payment processing platforms.
use_cases: Managing donor records from fundraising automation agents
Processing donations from nonprofit revenue agents
Automating membership renewals from membership management agents
Managing events from nonprofit event agents
not_for: For-profit businesses without nonprofit fundraising focus
Enterprise-scale nonprofits requiring Salesforce Nonprofit or Raiser's Edge
Government agencies without nonprofit fundraising context
best_when: A mid-size nonprofit, association, or membership organization using NeonCRM wants AI agents to automate donor management, fundraising, membership renewals, event registration, and constituent communication.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Nonprofit donor data is highly sensitive — automated donor prospect research and wealth screening must comply with privacy expectations of charitable giving. Automated recurring gift processing must handle failed payment retry rules carefully to avoid donor relationship damage. NeonCRM is part of Neon One portfolio; API surface may consolidate across Neon One products over time.

auth.notes: NeonCRM uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Developer portal at developer.neoncrm.com. Webhooks for CRM events. REST API with JSON. Chicago, Illinois HQ. Neon One (parent company). Neon One portfolio includes NeonCRM, Neon Pay, Neon Events, Neon Websites. Private (Roper Technologies spinoff 2022). 8,000+ nonprofit customers. Mid-size nonprofit focus. Competes with Blackbaud (Raiser's Edge NXT), Bloomerang, and Little Green Light for nonprofit CRM.

pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly subscription by feature tier and organization size
pricing.notes: Chicago. Neon One (Roper spinoff 2022). NeonCRM 8,000+ nonprofit customers. Mid-size nonprofit focus. Competes with Blackbaud, Bloomerang, and Salesforce Nonprofit for nonprofit CRM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per tier

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Donor wealth screening and prospect research must respect donor privacy expectations; automated third-party data enrichment without donor consent creates privacy and relationship risk

Failed payment retry rules — automated recurring gift retry must follow card network rules (Visa/MC retry rules) and respect donor preferences; aggressive retry creates chargebacks and donor attrition
Neon One portfolio consolidation — NeonCRM is part of Neon One with multiple products; API may evolve as Neon One consolidates product APIs
Gift processing accuracy — automated donation recording must handle matching gifts, soft credits, and tribute gifts correctly; incorrect gift attribution creates donor recognition errors
Event capacity management — automated event registration without capacity enforcement creates event overbooking
Membership renewal timing — automated membership renewal outreach must respect renewal window timing; premature renewal solicitation creates member friction
agent_readiness.security_notes: Nonprofit CRM. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2/API key. US. Donor and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Nonprofit CRM. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US. Donor and fundraising data.
